title: B3 + B4: fabric-hint rename + Signal C underseeded + hook configs cross-client
description: B3: Rename packages/cli/templates/hooks/archive-hint.cjs → fabric-hint.cjs. Add Signal C: nodes<10 AND time_since_last_fabric_init>=24h AND no knowledge_proposed event in last 24h → recommend fabric-import skill. Threshold tunable via fabric-config.json field underseed_node_threshold (default 10). New lint check #22 underseeded. Output JSON gains recommended_skill field (values: fabric-archive / fabric-review / fabric-import). B4: Fill packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/codex-hooks.json + cursor-hooks.json (currently empty/missing per rc.2 gap) — valid Stop hook registrations (plus placeholder SessionStart/PreToolUse slots for rc.6 to fill). CLI `fabric hooks install` validates all three clients resolve hook paths. Anchors: rc5-rc6-handoff.json#code_anchors.archive-hint.cjs + cursor-hooks.json.

files.change: Add Signal C (nodes<10 + cooldown); add recommended_skill field; structured JSON output
Fill with Stop hook registration referring fabric-hint.cjs
Fill with Stop hook registration referring fabric-hint.cjs
Validate all three client configs resolve hook paths

implementation: Edit fabric-hint.cjs: read .fabric/agents.meta.json for node count; read events.jsonl tail for last knowledge_proposed and last fabric_init events; compute Signal A (24h, set in TASK-015) + Signal C (nodes<10 + 24h-post-init + no proposed in 24h)
Add doctor.ts lint #22 underseeded: same node count + cooldown logic; report only (no auto-fix)
Update claude-code.json Stop hook command to point to fabric-hint.cjs
Create codex-hooks.json mirroring claude-code.json structure with Codex-CLI hook event names
Create cursor-hooks.json mirroring claude-code.json with Cursor hook event names
Update packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts install action to validate all 3 configs
Smoke test: run fabric hooks install on test repo; verify all 3 clients get hook

reference.pattern: Hook script + config + lint check trio

criteria: fabric-hint.cjs (renamed from archive-hint.cjs) outputs JSON with recommended_skill field
fabric-hint Signal C = nodes<10 AND time_since_last_init>=24h AND no knowledge_proposed event in last 24h
Hook configs complete for all three clients: claude-code.json / codex-hooks.json / cursor-hooks.json (Stop hook in all)
doctor lint #22 underseeded: nodes<10 reports recommendation to run fabric-import
fabric hooks install succeeds for all three clients

rationale.chosen_approach: Combine B3 + B4 — both are hook-template-layer changes, share the rename surface and config touch
alternatives_considered: Split into two separate tasks per scope.md
Defer B4 to rc.6 as part of E1/E2 config additions
decision_factors: Hook configs need fabric-hint.cjs path post-rename — couples to B3
B4 is small and independent of dual pending root
rationale.tradeoffs: Slightly larger single task; trade-off acceptable

manual_checks: Trigger fabric-hint.cjs manually; verify JSON output structure
success_metrics: 3 hook config files present and valid
Hook JSON output schema matches contract

risks.description: Codex CLI hook event names differ from Claude Code
risks.mitigation: Reference Codex CLI hook docs; cross-check with cursor as well
risks.fallback: Implement Codex/Cursor configs as best-effort; correct in dogfood test cycle
